content.en:
Bang!!!

The two Infinite Realm Beasts were fighting to the death, and the fluctuations of their battles made Ye Tiandu frightened.

Ye Tian was still far away from them, but they all felt a great suppression, if they were in the center of the battle, they were afraid that their flesh and blood would be annihilated in an instant.

"This is the combat power of the fifth stage!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

He didn't come closer, otherwise he wouldn't have been able to withstand the onslaught of their attacks.

But it didn't take long for the two immeasurable beasts to drag their injured bodies away, and they didn't distinguish between life and death.

If an immeasurable beast were to die casually, then the immeasurable blood gold stone would not be so rare.

Time passes slowly –

On this day, Ye Tian made a new discovery in the Infinite Realm Ruins.

"It's ...... Heavenly Ancestor-level attack!"

Ye Tian saw a fist mark, which ran through the immeasurable realm ruins, and the power of the fist mark was condensed, and he didn't know how long it had existed here.

Even when he approached the fist print, he felt a great deal of oppression, and he couldn't even really touch the fist mark.

It's not that Ye Tian hasn't seen traces of the Heavenly Ancestor level, but they are far from being comparable to this.

"When I first encountered the truncated finger inheritance in the Truncated Black Mountain, the finger I saw was estimated to be just a mark that didn't contain much power, and this fist mark was the full force of the real Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Maybe this fist mark has been around for a long time, and the power has dissipated a lot, and the real Heavenly Ancestor-level attack may be even more terrifying than this!

"This fist seal also has the value of enlightenment for me, let's meditate here for a period of time first!"

Ye Tian decided.

But soon, he found that the fist seal of Shenwu was much more difficult than the original Infinite Extreme Domain Technique of Shenwu, and the inheritance of the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique that he encountered in the Truncation Black Mountain was that Heavenly Ancestor who analyzed the fingering Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, allowing Ye Tian to comprehend it again and again.

However, this fist seal is not intended for any living beings to comprehend, so it is naturally very difficult to comprehend something from it.

However, if you really realize something from this fist seal, it will definitely not be an ordinary gain.

As the years passed, Ye Tian was silently contemplating here, practicing moves from time to time.

From the beginning, he didn't get anything, but gradually he realized something.

"This fist seal doesn't seem to contain any immeasurable extreme dao, it is a pure blow, but it seems to turn everything into instinct, completely integrating an extremely powerful energy into every part of the body, and it can burst out at will. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

And this power should be the power of the Infinite Divine Skill, and this Heavenly Ancestor has already used the Infinite Divine Power Technique to the extent of exploding casually, and regarded it as a general attack.

"This fist seal is not an immeasurable extreme domain technique, it is a use of immeasurable supernatural powers, and it is suitable for the fifth stage of high-level immeasurable life form comprehension. However, I was also able to reluctantly mobilize the power of the Immeasurable Divine Power Seed Imprint, and I could also comprehend and comprehend, and perhaps I could better exert the power of the Immeasurable Divine Power Seed Imprint, unlike the previous one, and my body was severely damaged. Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he worked hard to comprehend, and from time to time he would mobilize the power of the immeasurable supernatural power seed imprint in his body, and if his body was seriously damaged, he would copy one again.

In this way, Ye Tian's understanding and perception of the Infinite Divine Power Technique became more and more, and the sequelae of using the Infinite Divine Power Technique Seed Imprint Power Power was also getting lighter and lighter.

In the blink of an eye, tens of millions of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian was already qualified to attack the fourth stage.

In addition, his comprehension of the fist seal has also reached a limit, and it is difficult to continue to perceive things, but he has gained a lot.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian extracted the power of the immeasurable supernatural power seed mark in the depths of the immeasurable bone in his body and turned it into a sword in his hand.

Instantly, he stabbed another copy with a sword in his hand.

Tear and pull!

The sword easily tore through the body of another replica, and many defenses were useless.

With just one blow, another replica body was injured, and the injuries were severe.

After a few moves, another copy body was killed.

"I didn't expect that I would be able to manifest the power of the Immeasurable Divine Power Seed Imprint in my hand, compress it to the limit, turn it into a sword, and cast a sword ray, which could easily kill a copy body comparable to the fourth stage of the high-level immeasurable life form stage. This means that I can easily kill my previous self!"

It can be said that after mastering this method, his strength is equivalent to skyrocketing.

Immediately, he dispersed the power of the immeasurable supernatural power seed imprint, although his physical body was still damaged, it was not too serious, even if it was a method just now, he could still use it.

However, if you fight like this for a long time, this replica body will still collapse, but it is much better than before.

"This fist mark doesn't mean anything to me anymore, it's time to go!"

Ye Tian left here and continued to explore the Infinite Realm Ruins.

......

Ruins of stone towers.

Ye Tian is preparing to impact the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform realm here, with the cover of the ruins stone tower, he will break through in the Xuanqi realm, and no great ancestor or force will perceive it.

For this breakthrough, Ye Tian prepared a lot of resource materials, among which the Void Golden Water was well prepared, and there was no chance of an accident.

After the preparations were almost complete, Ye Tian began to attack the fourth stage.

In the realm of high-level immeasurable life forms, the third stage is to condense immeasurable blood, and the fourth stage is to use 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood to refine the whole body.

Under normal circumstances, once the whole body is tempered, it is best not to interrupt this process, otherwise the previous efforts will be wasted.

Therefore, Ye Tian needs to take a long time to complete this breakthrough process, which cannot be disturbed, otherwise he will have to start from scratch.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian took out some Void Golden Water, and after swallowing it in one gulp, he began to refine it rapidly, and then mobilized the 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood in his body to refine it from the skin, flesh and blood, internal organs, acupoints, and so on.

Since Ye Tian's immeasurable blood had reached the highest limit quality, it was easier for him to refine his whole body, and the speed of refining would be faster.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body was refining at an incredible speed, and the immeasurable blood was constantly consumed, and it quickly recovered under the supply of many resources, and continued to be refined.

It can be said that this breakthrough process is a process that consumes a lot of resources, and there is no such thing as a breakthrough without enough wealth.

Time passed, Ye Tian's breakthrough process was also very smooth, and the consumption of resources was nothing to Ye Tian.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian ushered in the most critical moment!
